title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Salmon with Turnip
description: A simple yet flavorful dish showcasing the delicate taste of Norwegian salmon paired with a turnip side dish.

ingredients.name: Turnips
ingredients.notes: Choose firm and dense turnips for best results

instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon fillets for 3-4 minutes per side or until cooked through.
Remove the salmon from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the cubed turnips and cook for 5-7 minutes or until tender.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the pan-seared salmon with the turnip side dish and garnish with parsley if desired.
